Items.Name: Google Pixel 8 Pro
Items.Description: Google Tensor G3 chip, 6.7-inch Super Actua display, and seven years of OS updates — pure Android at its best.

Items.Name: Samsung Galaxy Buds Core
Items.Description: Deep bass, 35-hour battery life, and IP54 sweat resistance. Enjoy seamless connectivity and comfortable fit.

Items.Name: MCHOSE V9 Pro
Items.Description: 50-hour battery life, 53mm bio-cellulose drivers, and ultra-low 15ms latency. Enjoy virtual 7.1 surround sound and AI noise-cancelling microphone for competitive gaming.

Items.Name: Rainy 75
Items.Description: CNC aluminum 75% keyboard with gasket mount, tri-mode connectivity, and signature "rain drop" thock sound.

Items.Name: VXE Dragonfly R1 SE+
Items.Description: 55g ultra-lightweight wireless gaming mouse with PixArt PAW3395 SE sensor, tri-mode connectivity (2.4GHz/Bluetooth/USB-C), and up to 70-hour battery life.
